scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.existsSync('package-lock.json') && fs.unlinkSync('package-lock.json'); fs.existsSync('yarn.lock') && fs.unlinkSync('yarn.lock'); if (!process.env.npm_config_user_agent?.includes('pnpm')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev:web: PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ API_PROXY_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:3001 pnpm --filter @workspace/nirogi-g-one-ai run dev
scripts.dev:local: pnpm run db:up && pnpm run db:push && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web"
